title: Freshly Sautéed Moroccan Orange Stir-Fry
description: A fresh and comforting vegan-friendly Moroccan dish featuring tender orange segments in a flavorful sauce.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add carrots and continue cooking for another 3-5 minutes until they begin to soften.
Stir in chopped garlic and cook for an additional minute until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in harissa paste and stir well to combine. Cook for about a minute more before adding the orange segments, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
Add water and drained tomatoes with their juice. Reduce heat to low-medium and simmer gently for 10 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Stir in ground coriander and cook for another minute or so until slightly toasted on top of the stove, enhancing the orange’s natural sweetness and spices.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
